title: GetResponse vs Moosend (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: GetResponse vs Moosend: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool for your needs.
intro: Choosing between GetResponse and Moosend comes down to your specific use case. Both are legitimate email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. GetResponse is built for online course creators and webinar hosts, while Moosend targets small businesses wanting unlimited emails at low cost. This comparison covers the key differences so you can decide quickly.

comparison_table.tool_a: Online Course Creators And Webinar Hosts
comparison_table.tool_b: Small Businesses Wanting Unlimited Emails At Low Cost

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on online course creators and webinar hosts
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on small businesses wanting unlimited emails at low cost

faq.a: It depends on your use case. GetResponse wins for online course creators and webinar hosts, while Moosend is stronger for small businesses wanting unlimited emails at low cost. Neither is objectively better — the right choice depends on your specific needs.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, GetResponse or Moosend?
faq.a: Moosend starts at a lower price point ($9/mo vs $19/mo). However, pricing scales with subscriber count, so the total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Moosend to GetResponse?
faq.a: Yes, switching from Moosend to GetResponse is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export for subscriber lists. Plan for some time to recreate automations and templates, as these rarely transfer directly between platforms.
